case_title: FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC VS. NICOLE BERTRAND et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BERTRAND, NICOLE DOES 1-5  INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC ON DEFENDANT BERTRAND, NICOLE
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
WRIT OF EXECUTION TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY (ISSUED MAR/25/03) RETURNER FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLAINTIFF'S POSSESSION ONLY FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BERTRAND, NICOLE
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC SERVED MAR-17-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BERTRAND, NICOLE
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT BERTRAND, NICOLE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERTRAND, NICOLE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1550 EDDY ST. #419, S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE DAILY RENTAL VALUE: $46.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
DECLARATION RE: DAILY RENTAL VALUE DATE UNLAWFUL DETAINER COMPLAINT WAS FILED, $46.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
